decision: All platform-managed resources in a landing zone live in a single dedicated resource group, separate from application resources.
why: Without a dedicated resource group, there is no clean boundary for teardown, RBAC, or incident management.

links.note: Managed identity is provisioned inside this resource group and managed by Azure Deployment Stack.
Resource group is the Deployment Stack scope — deleteAll tears down every platform-managed resource in one operation.
Log Analytics workspace lives inside this resource group and managed by Azure Deployment Stack.
VNet is provisioned inside this resource group and managed by platform Deployment Stack
Container Apps environment and jobs are provisioned inside this resource group and managed by Azure Deployment Stack

violations: Provisioning a resource outside the main.bicep landing zone template
